description: Fixture-backed audit of TypeScript/JavaScript preview cases that must not become actionable repair packets without stricter proof.

cases.why_not_actionable: TypeScript preview has owner, related-test, oracle, and probe evidence but lacks a complete repair packet contract
cases.repair_route: project canonical TypeScript repair packet fields only after verify, receipt, evidence refs, and edit boundaries are available
cases.future_support: mock payload support must name the callee, expected arguments, verify command, receipt command, evidence refs, and edit boundaries
cases.required_evidence_fragment: mock payloads are not yet a safe discriminator
cases.reason: Mock interaction evidence can show an observation shape, but without payload proof it must not ask for an exact-value assertion or emit a repair packet.

cases.risk_class: broad toThrow or rejects without payload
cases.why_not_actionable: TypeScript preview has owner, related-test, oracle, and probe evidence but lacks a complete repair packet contract
cases.repair_route: project canonical TypeScript repair packet fields only after verify, receipt, evidence refs, and edit boundaries are available
cases.future_support: complete error-path repair-card support may use exact payload evidence, but bare broad checks remain weak evidence
cases.required_evidence_fragment: broad error evidence does not establish missing discriminator
cases.reason: Broad thrown/rejected error evidence reaches the owner but does not prove the changed error payload; exact payload support is separate and fixture-pinned.

cases.why_not_actionable: TypeScript preview has owner, related-test, oracle, and probe evidence but lacks a complete repair packet contract
cases.repair_route: project canonical TypeScript repair packet fields only after verify, receipt, evidence refs, and edit boundaries are available
cases.future_support: repair-card guidance may suggest an exact-value assertion alongside the snapshot, but packet routing still requires strict actionability fields
cases.required_evidence_fragment: add an exact-value assertion alongside the snapshot
cases.reason: Snapshot evidence is useful context but must stay weak until an exact discriminator and full packet route exist.

cases.why_not_actionable: TypeScript preview has owner, related-test, oracle, and probe evidence but lacks a complete repair packet contract
cases.repair_route: project canonical TypeScript repair packet fields only after verify, receipt, evidence refs, and edit boundaries are available
cases.future_support: repair-card guidance may suggest replacing or augmenting truthiness with exact evidence, but packet routing still requires strict actionability fields
cases.required_evidence_fragment: replace or augment the smoke-only assertion
cases.reason: Truthiness reachability is weak evidence; it can guide a human without becoming an agent-safe repair packet.

cases.why_not_actionable: related-test link is heuristic-only and cannot safely borrow extracted assertions as proof
cases.repair_route: add a direct owner-call, import-aware, or receiver-aware relation before repair packet projection
cases.future_support: only a trusted token-aware owner-call, import-aware, or receiver-aware relation may promote this class beyond heuristic evidence
cases.reason: Heuristic related-test proximity is useful uncertainty evidence, not activation proof.

cases.risk_class: owner name in test title only
cases.why_not_actionable: related-test link is heuristic-only and cannot safely borrow extracted assertions as proof
cases.repair_route: add a direct owner-call, import-aware, or receiver-aware relation before repair packet projection
cases.future_support: test title tokens can remain ranking context, but they cannot supply related-test proof without a real owner-call relation
cases.reason: A test title that names the owner is not enough to prove the test executes changed behavior.

cases.why_not_actionable: TypeScript preview has owner, related-test, oracle, and probe evidence but lacks a complete repair packet contract
cases.repair_route: project canonical TypeScript repair packet fields only after verify, receipt, evidence refs, and edit boundaries are available
cases.future_support: bounded method receiver relation now supports direct new-instance receiver calls; repair-card support still needs canonical gap identity, repair kind, target shape, verify command, receipt command, evidence refs, and edit boundaries; factories, dependency injection, prototype aliases, and dynamic property access stay out of scope
cases.required_evidence_fragment: Related test reaches `total` with a smoke-only oracle
cases.reason: Direct receiver evidence is safe advisory context but not an actionable packet; ambiguous receiver shapes remain unsupported.

cases.why_not_actionable: TypeScript preview found related test evidence but cannot name a safe target discriminator or observer shape
cases.repair_route: add probe-specific discriminator extraction for this expression before repair packet projection
cases.future_support: module initializer support must distinguish exact exported value observers from relational/broad observers and dynamic initialization before repair-card projection
cases.reason: Direct module-initializer observers are useful advisory context, but relational checks and missing target shape must not become repair packets.

cases.why_not_actionable: static limit `mocked_module` prevents bounded TypeScript repair guidance
cases.repair_route: add mock-shape support or validate the real substitution under test before issuing a repair packet
cases.future_support: mock-shape support must resolve the substituted behavior before exact assertions can count as repair proof
cases.reason: Strong exact assertions do not override an opaque mocked-module substitution.

cases.why_not_actionable: static limit `decorator_indirection` prevents bounded TypeScript repair guidance
cases.repair_route: add decorator-aware owner modeling or verify decorator-modified behavior manually before issuing a repair packet
cases.future_support: decorator-aware owner modeling must prove the decorator-modified behavior before repair routing
cases.reason: Decorator-modified behavior is not modeled by syntax-first preview evidence.

cases.why_not_actionable: static limit `dynamic_dispatch` prevents bounded TypeScript repair guidance
cases.repair_route: inspect the concrete dispatch key or add analyzer support for explicit dispatch-map resolution before issuing a repair packet
cases.future_support: explicit dispatch-map resolution must prove the called behavior; computed member text alone remains a limit
cases.reason: Computed dispatch syntax is a named limitation until the target behavior is resolved safely.
